{"step_by_step_thinking": "The face bow transfer record is a critical step in transferring the patient's jaw position to the articulator. The physiologic rest position is the natural position of the mandible when the patient is relaxed and the temporomandibular joints are in their neutral position. Determining this position is essential for accurate face bow transfer. The inclination of each condyle, axial centre of rotation of condyle, and kinematic axis of movement of condyle are specific anatomical details that are not necessary for the initial arbitrary face bow transfer record.", "answer_choice": "A"}
